description: A designed graphic styled after a space-fantasy film poster. Against a starry sky and an orange-lit alien landscape, two cloaked silhouettes holding glowing blades stand on a rocky outcrop, with a distant spaceship. Large text reads 'MAY THE 4TH BECOME AN APPRENTICE TODAY' and a footer reads 'VISIT: APPRENTICESHIP.GOV', with a Department of Labor seal.
notable_text: MAY THE 4TH; BECOME AN APPRENTICE TODAY; VISIT: APPRENTICESHIP.GOV
